lead.headline: Day2Health's technical run-through arrives as legal documents remain unsigned.
lead.deck: You're launching into a live GTM session at 9:30 while critical paperwork from lawyers sits unsigned—a misalignment that could complicate what should be your clearest week of preparation. The next two hours determine whether you're ready to present from a position of strength.
